hook.emotional_mechanism_raw: curiosity about a named community project
hook.target_audience_raw: people with endometriosis or chronic illness

main_claim.text: Endo Events is a community-led, non-profit project for people with endometriosis and other chronic illnesses, which started from a single TikTok invitation.

supporting_explanation.summary: The speaker describes the origin story: she made a video asking if people would attend an event, got an overwhelming yes, held the first event, and built from there into a growing series with brand and organization involvement.

funnel_rationale: Broadly introduces a new community project aimed at awareness and connection, not specific to diagnosis or treatment paths.

cta.wording: if you're free on the 13th of June, the first ever London event is happening. Worth checking out 💛
cta.requested_action_raw: attend the London event on June 13

topic.primary_raw: Endometriosis community event / Endo Events launch

speaker.primary_raw: Laura – Women’s Health Creator (woman mentioned in caption)
speaker.type_raw: patient advocate / content creator with personal endo experience
